item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant correctly brakes the fourth repeated manual gate pattern, explicitly identifies the prior downstream checks, rejects adding another refrigerator-side confirmer as the default, and moves upstream to recurring process/data/ownership causes with structural fixes and subtraction limits. It allows only a bounded one-day emergency workaround, which does not trigger the fail signal because the default recommendation is to stop expanding manual confirmation gates."}
